title: SPPU – Assistant Professor – 133 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SPPU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 133 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SPPU Recruitment 2026 announces 133 vacancies for Assistant Professor posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Masters Degree, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, M.Phil/Ph.D can apply online from 23-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official SPPU website, sppudocs.unipune.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: For Media & Communication Studies (A-11): Candidates who graduated from reputed National Institutes like FTII, SRFTI etc. will be exempted from NET/SET.
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at https://admin.unipune.ac.in/recruitment (no hard copies to be sent)

age_limit.age_details: Bachelor's degree in any discipline AND Master's degree in MBA/PGDM/CA/ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent, and two years of professional experience after acquiring Master's degree.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with First Class or equivalent in any one of the degrees.

vacancy_details.post: 133 (subject to University's right to fill or not to fill)

selection_process: Document verification + Interview. Candidates eligible after document verification will be called for interview at their own expense.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the University website https://admin.unipune.ac.in/recruitment from 23-05-2026 to 01-06-2026. A separate application must be submitted for each post/department. Candidates should NOT send or submit hard copies of the recruitment application to the Head of the concerned Department or the Administration Teaching Section by post or in person at any time.
seo_tags: Savitribai Phule Pune University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026
